infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SENSEI needs camera access for AR navigation and object detection.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow SENSEI to access the microphone for always-on voice commands.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SENSEI needs location access for navigation.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: SENSEI needs Bluetooth access for wearable device integration.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow SENSEI to use speech recognition so you can control the app hands-free.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SENSEI to access camera for AR navigation.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow SENSEI to access the microphone for always-on voice commands.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow SENSEI to use speech recognition so you can control the app hands-free.
